nasb.text: When they had arrived and gathered the church together, they began to report all things that God had done with them and how He had opened a door of faith to the Gentiles.

esv.text: And when they arrived and gathered the church together, they declared all that God had done with them, and how he had opened a door of faith to the Gentiles.

cnv.text: 他們到了那裡，就召集了會眾，報告　神跟他們一起所行的一切，並且他為外族人開了信道的門。

ccb.text: 他们到达之后，就召集教会的人，报告上帝借着他们所做的一切事，以及上帝如何给外族人开了信仰之门。

csbs.text: 他们到了，就召集教会，传讲了神与他们所做的一切事，以及神怎样为外邦人打开了信仰之门。
